zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll於1504年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克時，她的父親Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll)24歲，母親Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely19歲。她於1511年與James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1548年在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克阿斯可亞頓享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll于1504年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克时，她的父亲Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll)24岁，母亲Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely19岁。她于1511年与James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1548年在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克阿斯可亞頓享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Carroll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Cian, Cormac, Fergus, Finbarr, James Patrick, Jarlath, John Patrick, Sinead, Siobhan.
Irish (Dublin and Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cearbhaill ‘descendant of Cearbhall’ (see Carroll ).

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Biblical name meaning ‘he knows’ in Hebrew, borne by a son of Onam. In modern usage, however, the name, being borne predominantly if not exclusively by girls, is more likely an altered and more obviously feminine form of   Jade   rather than a revival of the biblical name.

nameMeanings.name: More
meanings: A Welsh name derived from mawr, great.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll was born in 1504, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, her father, Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll), was 24 and her mother, Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely, was 19. She married James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond in 1511, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1548, in Askeaton, County Limerick, Ireland, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll est née en 1504, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll), avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond en 1511, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1548, à Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlande, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll 1504 in Cork, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll) 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely 19. Sie hat 1511 in Cork, County Cork, Irland James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1548 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Askeaton, County Limerick, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll è nata il nel 1504 nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, sua padre, Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll), aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond nel 1511, nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1548, nel Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlanda, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carrollが1504年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで生まれた時，父Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll)は24歳，母Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Elyは19歳であった。1511年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクでJames (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1548年にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックアスケアトンで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll(이)가 1504년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll)(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1511년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1548년 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 아스케앳에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll nasceu em 1504, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll), tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond em 1511, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1548, em Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlanda, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll родилась в 1504 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll) было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond в 1511 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1548 г. в местности аскитон, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady More O'Caerbhaill O'Carroll nació en 1504, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Maolroona, King of Eile O'Cearbhaill (O'Carroll), tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret O'Brien Queen of Ely, tenía 19 años. Se casó con James (Seamus) FitzJohn FitzGerald 14th Earl of Desmond en 1511, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1548, en Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlanda, a la edad de 44 años.
